subcodes.first_line: O thou learned one in the school! All the inhabitants of the earth are even as children, and untutored pupils who must learn their lessons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان جمیع اهل زمین طفلان مهانند و فرزندان نادان سبق خوان پس در
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @education of children; moral education, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @service to others; to the Cause of God
